name: @flagpost/action
description: GitHub Action that validates flag YAML and builds flags.json for a flagpost repo
author: Ian Welerson

scripts.build: ncc build src/index.ts -o dist --source-map --license licenses.txt && node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist/action',{recursive:true,force:true});require('node:fs').rmSync('dist/core',{recursive:true,force:true})"
